title: Time Limit
description: You have [blue]3[/blue] more turns to defeat the Battleworn Dummy.
smart_description: You have [blue]{Amount}[/blue] more {Amount:plural:turn|turns} to defeat the Battleworn Dummy.
notes: This power functions as a timer for the Battleworn Dummy encounter. It decrements by 1 each turn. When it reaches 0, the encounter ends with failure (RanOutOfTime flag set).
